brief: Wildfire smoke poses health risks across the U.S. as Canadian fires continue; UK Prime Minister Burnham prepares cabinet picks; Amazon Web Services suffers major billing glitch; stock markets fall on AI spending concerns. Meanwhile, research explores second language writing, AI coding agent vulnerabilities, and human-robot juggling.
news_summary: Persistent wildfire smoke prompts health warnings and DIY air purifier tips; President Trump escalates election fraud claims using declassified intel; Amazon AWS customers hit by multibillion-dollar billing errors; UK leader Burnham finalizes cabinet; stocks slide on tech spending anxiety.
papers_summary: Studies analyze L2 writing instruction and ChatGPT's impact on rhetorical moves; research on urban driving data causality, AI coding agent security, and human-robot juggling highlight emerging interaction challenges.

en.brief: Wildfire smoke poses health risks across the U.S. as Canadian fires continue; UK Prime Minister Burnham prepares cabinet picks; Amazon Web Services suffers major billing glitch; stock markets fall on AI spending concerns. Meanwhile, research explores second language writing, AI coding agent vulnerabilities, and human-robot juggling.
en.news_summary: Persistent wildfire smoke prompts health warnings and DIY air purifier tips; President Trump escalates election fraud claims using declassified intel; Amazon AWS customers hit by multibillion-dollar billing errors; UK leader Burnham finalizes cabinet; stocks slide on tech spending anxiety.
en.papers_summary: Studies analyze L2 writing instruction and ChatGPT's impact on rhetorical moves; research on urban driving data causality, AI coding agent security, and human-robot juggling highlight emerging interaction challenges.

zh.brief: 英国新任首相贝安德就职，其政策走向引关注；特朗普借政府资源强化选举舞弊指控；全球市场因科技AI支出担忧下跌。
zh.news_summary: 贝安德成为英国工党党魁并有望任首相，其中国政策和大曼城市长务实经验受热议；特朗普利用解密文件强化选举舞弊言论，中国否认干预；美股因科技股和AI支出忧虑大幅下跌。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无优先论文，但英文资料显示有研究探讨写作过程中停顿的语境功能以及多模态大模型对科学可视化素养的评估。

todays_image.caption: A fan in a box can stir or contain air, much like how protective measures aim to contain and filter the smoke equivalent of half a pack a day.
todays_image.title: Pleated fan and box
